headline: Norwegian Cruise Line Gears Up For Q4 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
summary: NCLH to release Q4 earnings on March 2. Analysts expect 26 cents/share and $2.34B in revenue. Activist investor has 10% stake. Stock fell 0.9%.
